title: Land Acknowledgement and History
---

Emory faculty have developed an unofficial [Land Acknowledgement and History Statement](https://gorkinlab.org/land-acknowledge-and-history/) for Emory University. This is one important step — but only one — toward recognizing and repairing the long history of policies and ideas that have been hostile toward Indigenous people.
